description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Claroline 1.7.5 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the (1) clarolineRepositorySys parameter to (a) atutor.inc.php (b) db-generic.inc.php (c) docebo.inc.php (d) dokeos.1.6.inc.php (e) dokeos.inc.php (f) ganesha.inc.php (g) mambo.inc.php (h) moodle.inc.php (i) phpnuke.inc.php (j) postnuke.inc.php and (k) spip.inc.php in claroline/auth/extauth/drivers/; (2) includePath parameter in mambo.inc.php, postnuke.inc.php, and (l) inc/lib/event/init_event_manager.inc.php; and (3) rootSys parameter in (m) inc/lib/export_exe_tracking.class.php, a different set of vectors than CVE-2006-2284.
